class_activities.title: Mission Morning Yoga Flow
class_activities.description: An all-levels vinyasa class focused on gentle strength and deep stretching to start your Saturday in the Mission District.

class_activities.description: Interval-based strength and cardio bootcamp using bodyweight and light equipment, held on the southwest corner of Dolores Park.

class_activities.title: Valencia Street Evening HIIT
class_activities.description: High-intensity interval training with kettlebells and resistance bands, designed to torch calories in under an hour.

class_activities.title: Bernal Pilates & Core Strength
class_activities.description: Mat pilates and core-conditioning session in a small group studio near Bernal Heights Park.

class_activities.title: Mission Friday Night Spin Ride
class_activities.description: Energetic indoor cycling class with upbeat music and interval training, suitable for intermediate riders.

class_activities.title: Kids Art Lab in the Mission
class_activities.description: Hands-on mixed media art class for kids ages 6–10, exploring painting, collage, and sculpture.

class_activities.title: Salsa Dancing Basics
class_activities.description: Beginner-friendly salsa class covering timing, connection, and turns. No partner required.

class_activities.title: Intro to Wheel Throwing
class_activities.description: Learn the basics of wheel throwing, trimming, and glazing in this small-group pottery class.

class_activities.title: Weekend Intro to Web Coding
class_activities.description: Two-day intensive workshop covering HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript for complete beginners.

class_activities.title: City Park Sunrise Bootcamp
class_activities.description: Full-body outdoor bootcamp using resistance bands and hill sprints, held at Denver's City Park.

class_activities.description: A live-streamed, instructor-led meditation session focusing on breathwork and relaxation.

class_activities.title: Family Swim Lessons
class_activities.description: Group swim instruction for kids and parents focusing on water safety and beginner strokes.

events.title: Downtown Family Fun Fair
events.description: An afternoon of carnival games, bounce houses, face painting, and live kids' music. All activities and entry are free.

events.title: Kids' Science & Discovery Expo
events.description: Interactive science experiments, planetarium shows, and maker stations geared toward school-age kids.

events.title: Family Storytime & Crafts
events.description: Librarian-led picture book readings followed by a simple craft project. Ideal for ages 3–7.

events.title: Children's Theater Matinee: The Forest Adventure
events.description: A 60-minute, kid-friendly theater performance with puppets, music, and audience interaction.

events.title: Spring Food Truck Festival
events.description: Sample bites from over 25 local food trucks with live music and a beer garden.

events.title: Summer Concert Series: Jazz Night
events.description: An evening of live jazz featuring local bands and food vendors.

events.title: First Friday Art Walk
events.description: Self-guided tour of downtown galleries and studios with late-night openings and refreshments.

events.title: SF Frontend Dev Meetup
events.description: Lightning talks, demos, and networking for frontend developers of all levels.

events.title: Neighborhood Park Cleanup Day
events.description: Volunteer with your neighbors to clean up litter and plant new flowers in the local park.

service_providers.name: RapidFlow 24/7 Plumbing
service_providers.description: Licensed Atlanta plumbers specializing in fast-response 24/7 emergency leaks, backups, and burst pipes.
service_providers.service_area_description: Within 20 miles of downtown Atlanta, including zip codes 30301–30318.

service_providers.description: Family-owned plumbing company offering same-day service for clogs, leaks, and fixture installs.
service_providers.service_area_description: Midtown, Downtown, and Old Fourth Ward neighborhoods.

service_providers.name: Midtown Rooter & Drain
service_providers.description: Drain and sewer specialists with camera inspections and hydro-jetting services.
service_providers.service_area_description: Service within 15 miles of 30309 including Buckhead and Midtown.

service_providers.name: Southern Pipeworks Plumbing
service_providers.description: Full-service residential plumbing company serving north metro Atlanta suburbs.
service_providers.service_area_description: Cobb County and North Fulton County suburbs.

service_providers.name: Atlanta HVAC Care
service_providers.description: Heating and cooling installation, tune-ups, and emergency repairs for homes and small businesses.

service_providers.name: BrightSpark Electric
service_providers.description: Residential and light commercial electricians handling panel upgrades, rewiring, and lighting.

service_providers.name: Mile High Plumbing & Heating

service_providers.service_area_description: Denver metro area within 20 miles of 80202.

service_providers.name: Greenway Home Cleaning
service_providers.description: Eco-friendly recurring and one-time home cleaning with non-toxic products.

service_providers.description: 24/7 mobile locksmith offering home and auto lockout service, rekeying, and lock installation.
service_providers.service_area_description: Within 25 miles of Atlanta city center.

service_providers.name: RoofGuard Roofing & Repair
service_providers.description: Licensed roofing contractors handling inspections, repairs, and full roof replacements.

service_providers.name: Manhattan Plumbing Pros
service_providers.description: Full-service Manhattan plumbers available for co-op and condo buildings citywide.

place_reviews.review_text: Loved the fresh seasonal menu and the many vegetarian options. The atmosphere is cozy without being cramped, and the staff were attentive.
Great date spot with plenty of veggie dishes and a calm, intimate vibe. A bit slow on mains, but overall a really nice experience.
Excellent handmade pasta and a surprisingly affordable wine list. Candlelit tables make it feel very romantic without breaking the bank.
Portions are generous, the marinara sauce is fantastic, and they handled our group of six smoothly on a busy Friday.
My go-to work coffee shop: plenty of outlets, strong Wi-Fi, and the staff doesnt mind you camping out for a few hours with a laptop.
Super quiet for SoMa, great espresso, and big tables that make it easy to spread out and get serious work done.

places.name: Green Garden Bistro
places.description: Cozy neighborhood bistro with a seasonal farm-to-table menu and plenty of vegetarian options.

places.name: Bella Notte Trattoria
places.description: Intimate Italian trattoria serving handmade pasta, wood-fired pizzas, and classic desserts at wallet-friendly prices.

places.name: Focus Coffee - Mid-Market
places.description: Bright cafe with large communal tables, fast Wi-Fi, and plenty of outlets, popular with remote workers.

places.name: Focus Coffee - SoMa
places.description: Quiet SoMa outpost of Focus Coffee with individual work nooks, abundant outlets, and strong espresso.

places.name: Lakeshore Grill & Kitchen
places.description: Casual grill near the lakefront offering burgers, salads, and light seafood, ideal for pre-movie dinners.

places.name: Grand Avenue Cinema
places.description: Modern multiplex cinema with reserved seating, reclining chairs, and a full snack bar.

places.name: Union Station Artisan Gifts
places.description: Boutique gift shop featuring locally made candles, jewelry, stationery, and small-batch snacks.

places.name: Larimer Square Handmade Market
places.description: Cozy marketplace featuring rotating local makers offering ceramics, textiles, prints, and other handmade gifts.

places.name: Trattoria Amalfi
places.description: Classic Italian spot with a lengthy wine list and coastal-inspired dishes, popular with theatergoers.

places.name: Mission Roasters
places.description: Neighborhood coffee roastery with outdoor seating, small bites, and rotating single-origin beans.

places.name: Denver Central Cafe
places.description: Casual downtown cafe with sandwiches, salads, and espresso drinks, popular with office workers.

places.name: Cherry Creek Gift Boutique
places.description: Curated boutique offering home decor, stationery, and upscale gifts from national brands.

deals.title: Luxury Facial & Peel Package
deals.description: 75-minute customized facial with enzyme peel, extractions, and hydrating mask at a boutique spa.

deals.title: 60-Minute Deep Tissue Massage
deals.description: Full-body deep tissue massage focused on neck, shoulders, and lower back tension relief.

deals.title: Gel Manicure & Spa Pedicure Combo
deals.description: Classic spa pedicure and long-lasting gel manicure, including sugar scrub and hot towel treatment.

deals.title: Couples Spa Day with Aromatherapy
deals.description: Access to spa amenities plus side-by-side 50-minute aromatherapy massages for two guests.

deals.title: Express 30-Minute Facial (April Promo)
deals.description: Quick cleanse, exfoliation, and hydration treatment ideal for a mid-day refresh.

deals.title: Salon Blowout & Conditioning Treatment
deals.description: Shampoo, deep conditioning mask, and professional blowout style for any hair length.

deals.title: Bella Notte 3-Course Date Night Dinner
deals.description: Shared appetizer, two pasta entrées, and a dessert to share at Bella Notte Trattoria.

deals.title: Focus Coffee Remote Worker Bundle
deals.description: Any large drink plus pastry and 3-hour reserved workspace at Focus Coffee - Mid-Market.

deals.title: Grand Avenue Cinema Date Night Combo
deals.description: Two movie tickets plus one large popcorn and two fountain drinks at Grand Avenue Cinema.

deals.title: Union Station Local Artisan Gift Box
deals.description: Curated gift box with a handmade candle, local chocolate, and letterpress card.

deals.title: Weekend Brunch for Two at Lakeshore Grill
deals.description: Choice of any two brunch entrées and two mimosas at Lakeshore Grill & Kitchen.

deals.title: Mission Yoga 5-Class Pack
deals.description: Five all-levels yoga classes redeemable at Mission Yoga Collective over two months.
